title: Croatian Vegetable Platter with Flatbread
description: A keto-friendly platter featuring Croatian flatbread, roasted vegetables, and a side of rustic charm.
instructions: Brush flatbread with vegetable oil and season with rustic salt.
Arrange flatbread on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, toss mushrooms, bell peppers, and onions with a pinch of rustic salt.
Spread vegetables on a separate baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with flatbread.
